FSM_REQUESTS

Table storing concrete attributes for type FSM_REQ.

Columns
req_id (`number`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_OBJECTS.

req_rtp_id (`varchar2(50 char)`)

Request type, reference to FSM_REQUEST_TYPES.

req_rre_id (`varchar2(50 char)`)

Requesting person, reference to FSM_REQUESTORS.

req_text (`varchar2(1000 char)`)

Text the requestor entered for the request.

Dependencies
req_id

references FSM_OBJECTS (fsm_id)

req_rre_id

references FSM_REQUESTORS (rre_id)

req_rtp_id

references FSM_REQUEST_TYPES (rtp_id)
